benchmark_cmd:
benchmark_serving.py --model /SFS-aGqda6ct/models/DeepSeek-R1-0528-NVFP4-v2 --port 8888 --backend openai --input-len 1024 --output-len 8192 --random-range-ratio 0.8 --num-prompts 2560 --max-concurrency 256 --num-warmups 512 --result-filename result_fp4_throughput_reasoning_ep8_c256 --result-dir ./results/b200_dsr_fp4/b200_dsr_fp4_mtp0_ep8_tp8_post2 --metadata max_model_len=10240 kv_cache_dtype=fp8 kv_cache_free_mem_fraction=0.8 tensor_parallel_size=8 gpu_count=8 ep_size=8 dp_attention=false moe_backend=TRTLLM mtp_layers=0 piecewise_cuda_graphs=false random_range_ratio=0.8 trtllm_version=[TensorRT-LLM] TensorRT LLM version: 1.2.0rc6.post2
1.2.0rc6.post2 container_image=nvcr.io/nvidia/tensorrt-llm/release:1.2.0rc6.post2
config_yaml:
max_batch_size: 256
cuda_graph_config:
    enable_padding: true
    max_batch_size: 256
enable_attention_dp: false
print_iter_log: true
kv_cache_config:
    dtype: fp8
    free_gpu_memory_fraction: 0.8
    enable_block_reuse: false
stream_interval: 10
moe_config:
    backend: TRTLLM
